title: Not To Covet Much Where Little Is The Charge.
content:
Why should we covet much, whenas we know
    W'ave more to bear our charge than way to go?
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Not To Covet Much Where Little Is The Charge."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
